metadata.name: Review and Approve a Vendor Invoice

description: A managing partner needs to review and approve an invoice from an expert witness before it can be paid.

nodes.task_description: Review the expert witness invoice for compliance with the terms of their engagement letter.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies that the hourly rates and expenses are correct.

nodes.task_description: Approve the invoice for payment in the firm's accounting system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent marks the invoice as approved.

nodes.task_description: Forward the approved invoice to the accounts payable department to process the payment.
